person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Reginar IV, Count of Mons (c. 950-1013) was the son of Reginar III, Count of Hainaut. Lambert I of Leuven was his brother.

«b»History«/b»
His father was Count of Hainaut until 958, but fell in disgrace with Otto I, Holy Roman Emperor and lost his County to Godfrey I, Duke of Lower Lorraine.

He received the County of Mons in 973 but was replaced with Godfrey I, Count of Verdun in 974. He replaced Godfrey as Count of Mons in 998.

«b»Family«/b»
Regnier IV married Hedwig, daughter of Hugh Capet and Adelaide of Poitou.
They had children:

1.) Reginar V, Count of Mons, married Mathilde of Verdun, daughter of Herman, Count of Brabant.

2.) Lambert of Mons

3.) Beatrix, who married Ebles I, Count of Rheims and Roucy and Archbishop of Rheims.

4.) Ermentrude, died at the age of two or three; buried in the Collegiate Church of Saint Gertrude in Nivelles, Belgium. The burial came to light during an excavation. A lead cross, inscribed with her name and that of her parents, was found in the tomb.

sourceList.title: Reginar IV de Hainaut, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons於0948年1月1日出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內萊姆斯時，他的父親Régnier III comte de Hainaut29歲，母親Adela de Dagsbourg19歲。他於0986年與Hedwige de France結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1013年9月12日在比利時納姆爾福洛倫斯享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

Perhaps also an altered form of German   Ehm  .

nameMeanings.name: Régnier

meanings: The usual Danish form of   Ragnar .

variants.name: Ragnar
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name cognate with Rayner .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons was born on 1 January 0948, in Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Régnier III comte de Hainaut, was 29 and his mother, Adela de Dagsbourg, was 19. He married Hedwige de France in 0986. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 September 1013, in Florennes, Namur, Belgium, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons est né le 1 janvier 0948, à Reims, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Régnier III comte de Hainaut, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Adela de Dagsbourg, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Hedwige de France en 0986. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1013, à Florennes, Namur, Belgique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons am 1. Januar 0948 in Reims, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Régnier III comte de Hainaut 29 und seine Mutter Adela de Dagsbourg 19. Er hat 0986 Hedwige de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. September 1013 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Florennes, Namen, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons è nato il il 1 gennaio 0948 nel Reims, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Régnier III comte de Hainaut, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Adela de Dagsbourg, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Hedwige de France nel 0986. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 settembre 1013, nel Florennes, Namur, Belgio, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Monsが0948年1月1日にフランスグランド エストマルンレイムズで生まれた時，父Régnier III comte de Hainautは29歳，母Adela de Dagsbourgは19歳であった。0986年にHedwige de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1013年9月12日にベルギーナムルフロアンスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons(이)가 0948년 1월 1일 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 레임스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Régnier III comte de Hainaut(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Adela de Dagsbourg(은)는 19세였다. 그는 0986년 Hedwige de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1013년 9월 12일 벨기에 남어 플로렌스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 janvier 0948–12 septembre 1013: 1 de janeiro de 0948–12 de setembro de 1013
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 0948, em Reims, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Régnier III comte de Hainaut, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Adela de Dagsbourg, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwige de France em 0986. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1013, em Florennes, Namur, Bélgica, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Régnier IV de Hainaut et de Mons родился 1 января 0948 г. в местности римс, марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Régnier III comte de Hainaut было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Adela de Dagsbourg, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwige de France в 0986 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 сентября 1013 г. в местности флореннесь, намур, Бельгия в возрасте 65 лет.

Se casó con Hedwige de France en 0986. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1013, en Florennes, Namur, Bélgica, a la edad de 65 años.
